title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic released the Claude Mythos 5 model family with Fable 5 (a version with guardrails) now generally available. Fable 5 is included at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which it will require usage credits pending capacity availability.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5 to general availability, with Fable 5 described as Mythos 5 paired with guardrails. The pricing detail matters for current subscribers: Fable 5 is included at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which usage will require credits.
